docs.title: Concord incident response runbook
docs.severity_levels: SEV-1 (data exposure, prod down), SEV-2 (degraded), SEV-3 (cosmetic)
docs.escalation_path: SEV-1 → CTO + Eng Manager within 15min. SEV-2 → On-call → Eng Manager. SEV-3 → JIRA.
docs.communication_plan: SEV-1 status page updates every 30min until resolved. Customer notification within 4h for confirmed data exposure.
